review.note: AI-drafted first pass - SME review required before production

sources.title: Grade 11 - Term 1: Communism in Russia 1900 to 1940

slides.title: UBukhomanisi eRussia, 1900-1940
slides.lead: Ukuthi umbuso omkhulu wabalimi obuswa uMbusi (Tsar) waguquka kanjani waba ngumbuso wokuqala emhlabeni wobukhomanisi - futhi ngezindleko ezinjani zempilo yabantu.

media.alt: Inkanyezi ebomvu iphakama phezu kwesithombe esenziwe sezimboni ezinezishimula.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g fill='#4a4a4a'><rect x='40' y='84' width='22' height='44'/><rect x='78' y='66' width='22' height='62'/><rect x='116' y='96' width='22' height='32'/></g><path d='M232 34 l10 30 h32 l-26 19 10 31 -26 -19 -26 19 10 -31 -26 -19 h32 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka umbuzo omkhulu weyunithi: kwenzeka kanjani futhi kungani iRussia yasuka embusweni ozibusa wobukhosi (tsarist autocracy) yaba umbuso woqembu olulodwa lobukhomanisi ngeminyaka emibili nje engamashumi? Bhekisisa izigaba ezintathu abafundi abazozihlaziya - ukuwa kombuso wamaTsar, ukuthathwa kwamandla ngamaBolshevik nokuwaqinisa, kanye noguquko lukaStalin lwe-USSR. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi bakale kokubili izithembiso zenguquko nezindleko zayo.

slides.title: IRussia yamaTsar cishe ngo-1900
slides.lead: Umbuso ozibusayo lapho iqoqo elincane le-elite lalinamandla phezu kwabantu abampofu, ababeyibaningi bengabalimi.

blocks.text: IRussia yayibuswa ngumbusi ozibusayo (**autocrat**), uMbusi **Nicholas II** wozalo lwakwaRomanov, owayethi unamandla aphelele avela kuNkulunkulu futhi engaphenduli kunoma yiphi iphalamende. Umphakathi wawungalingani kakhulu: iqoqo elincane lezikhulu nesigaba esikhulayo esiphakathi sasingaphezulu kwezigidi zabantu **abalimi** abampofu kanye nesigaba esisha **sabasebenzi** basemadolobheni.

items: Cishe u-80% wesibalo sabantu babengabalimi, abaningi ababesempofini enzulu naphezu kokukhululwa kwezigqila zomhlaba (serfs) ngo-1861.
Ukwakhiwa kwezimboni ngesivinini kwadala amadolobha aminyene kanye nezimo ezinzima zasezimbonini.
Amaphoyisa ayimfihlo (i-Okhrana) kanye nokuvinjelwa kwamaphephandaba kwathulisa abaphikisi bezombusazwe.

media.alt: Iphiramidi ehlukaniswe izigaba, ingqophamlando encane ngaphezu kwesisekelo esibanzi, ekhombisa umphakathi ongalingani.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M110 24 L96 60 H124 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M96 60 L82 96 H138 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M82 96 L64 140 H156 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><line x1='0' y1='60' x2='220' y2='60' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='0' y1='96' x2='220' y2='96' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela ukungqubuzana kwezakhiwo okwenza iRussia ingazinzi: umbuso ozibusayo ongenayo indlela esemthethweni yokukhononda, isibalo esikhulu sabalimi abampofu abomele umhlaba, kanye nesigaba esincane kodwa esinamandla sabasebenzi bezimboni. Yilezi zingcindezi izishoshovu ezaziyosizisebenzisa kamuva. Ethula igama elithi autocracy (ukuzibusa) uliqhathanise nombuso onomthethosisekelo.

slides.title: Imibono yenguquko
slides.lead: Ukuphikisana noMbusi kwakususelwa kwizimfundiso ezehlukene, ikakhulukazi ubuMarx (Marxism).

blocks.heading: UbuMarx (Marxism)
blocks.text: UKarl Marx wayethi umlando uqhutshwa ukulwa kwezigaba (class struggle) nokuthi abasebenzi (i-proletariat) babeyoketula isigaba sabongxiwankulu (capitalists).

blocks.heading: AmaBolshevik
blocks.text: Iqembu eliqatha eliholwa uLenin elalifuna iqembu elihlelekile ngokuqinile ukuze lithathe amandla ngenxa yabasebenzi.

blocks.heading: AmaMenshevik
blocks.text: Iqembu lamaMarx elilinganiselayo elalikholwa ukuthi iRussia kufanele iqale idlule ebongxiwankulwini, kuneqembu elibanzi.

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi iRussian Social Democratic Labour Party yahlukana ngo-1903 yaba amaBolshevik (aholwa uLenin) namaMenshevik. Gcina umehluko ulula kodwa unembile: bobabili babengamaMarx, kodwa babengavumelani ngesakhiwo seqembu nokuthi inguquko ingafika ngokushesha kangakanani. Lokhu kuhlukana kubalulekile ngoba yiwo amaBolshevik agcina ethathe amandla ngo-1917.

slides.title: INguquko ka-1905
slides.lead: Ukuhlulwa empini nokubulawa kwababhikishi abanokuthula kwazamazamisa igunya loMbusi.

blocks.text: Ukuhlulwa okuhlazisayo **eMpini yamaRussia namaJapane (1904-1905)** kwakhulisa ukunganeliseki. **NgeSonto Legazi** (22 Januwari 1905) amasosha adubula abamashi abanokuthula ababecela kuMbusi eSt Petersburg, abulala abaningi. Iziteleka, imvukelo, kanye nemikhandlu yokuqala yabasebenzi, noma ama-**soviet**, kwasakazeka kuwo wonke umbuso.

items: Ukuze asinde, uNicholas II wakhipha i-October Manifesto ethembisa iphalamende (i-Duma) namalungelo abantu.
Kwathi lapho ukuthula sekubuyile, wabuye wawahoxisa lawa mavumelwano wagcina amandla angempela.
Unyaka we-1905 uvame ukubizwa 'ngokuzilolonga' kwezinguquko zango-1917.

media.alt: Isixuku sabantu abancane phambi kwamasango esigodlo, kunefulege elibomvu eliphakanyisiwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='90' height='96' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#8a8a8a'><rect x='158' y='52' width='8' height='84'/><rect x='176' y='52' width='8' height='84'/><rect x='194' y='52' width='8' height='84'/><rect x='212' y='52' width='8' height='84'/></g><g fill='#4a4a4a'><circle cx='30' cy='104' r='7'/><circle cx='52' cy='100' r='7'/><circle cx='74' cy='106' r='7'/><circle cx='96' cy='100' r='7'/><circle cx='118' cy='106' r='7'/></g><rect x='70' y='60' width='4' height='44' fill='#5a3a24'/><rect x='74' y='60' width='30' height='18' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sebenzisa unyaka we-1905 ukukhombisa iphethini: inhlekelele (impi) kanye nembangela esheshayo (iSonto Legazi) kanye nobunzima bezomnotho kudala isiyaluyalu sabantu abaningi. Gcizelela ukuthi uMbusi wasinda kuphela ngokwenza izithembiso angazange azigcine, okwaphinda kwamehlisa isithunzi. Ama-soviet avela lapha okokuqala futhi azophinda avele ngo-1917, ngakho wagqamise.

slides.title: IMpi Yezwe Yokuqala nengcindezi eRussia
slides.lead: Impi yonke yaveza ubuthakathaka bombuso wamaTsar yawuhlulisela emkhawulweni wokuwohloka.

blocks.text: IRussia yangena **eMpini Yezwe Yokuqala (World War I)** ngo-1914. Amabutho ayehlomiswe kabi alahlekelwa abaningi, kanti ukushoda kokudla nophethiroli kwabamba amadolobha. UNicholas II wathatha ubuholi ngokwakhe empini, eshiya uhulumeni ezandleni **zaNdlovukazi Alexandra** ongathandwayo kanye nomeluleki onegama elibi **uRasputin**.

items: Izigidi zamasosha zabulawa, zalimala noma zathunjwa.
Ukwehla kwamandla emali nokushoda kwezinto kwadala indlala nemigqa emide yesinkwa ePetrograd.
Ngasekuqaleni kuka-1917 ukwethembeka kuMbusi kwase kuwohlokile phakathi kwabasebenzi, amasosha, ngisho nama-elite.

media.alt: Igrafu enomugqa okhuphukayo okhombisa ubunzima obukhula kuya ku-1917.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='30' y1='20' x2='30' y2='134' stroke='#4a4a4a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='134' x2='214' y2='134' stroke='#4a4a4a' stroke-width='2'/><polyline points='34,120 78,108 122,84 166,52 208,26' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><text x='120' y='152' font-size='11' fill='#4a4a4a' text-anchor='middle'>1914 to 1917</text></svg>

slides.notes: Beka iMpi Yezwe Yokuqala njengembangela eyaguqula izinkinga ezinde zaba ukuwohloka okuphelele. Umbono osemqoka kubafundi be-FET yimbangela (causation): impi ayizange iyidale izinkinga zeRussia kodwa yazandisa kakhulu yayikhipha uMbusi ekusekelweni okwakusele. Qaphela ukulahleka kokwethembeka kwebutho - ngaphandle kwamasosha, umbuso wawungakwazi ukuzivikela.

slides.title: Ukuwa koMbusi
slides.lead: NgoMashi 1917 (uFebruwari ngekhalenda endala yamaRussia) iziteleka nemvukelo kwasusa ubukhosi.

blocks.text: Imibhikisho yesinkwa neziteleka **ePetrograd** kwakhula kwaba imibhikisho emikhulu. Lapho amasosha enqaba ukudubula izixuku futhi ajoyina zona, umbuso walahlekelwa ukulawula. **NgoMashi 15, 1917 (2 Mashi, ikhalenda endala)** uNicholas II **wesula esikhundleni (abdicated)**, waqeda umbuso wakwaRomanov owawuneminyaka engaphezu kuka-300.

items: **UHulumeni Wesikhashana (Provisional Government)** wosopolitiki abanamalungelo abantu nabalinganiselayo wathatha izintambo.
Ngesikhathi esifanayo **iSoviet yasePetrograd** yabasebenzi namasosha yayinamandla angempela.
Lokhu kugxumana kwaziwa ngokuthi **Amandla Amabili (Dual Power)** - iziphathimandla ezimbili ezincintisana ukubusa.

media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='78' y='110' width='44' height='30' fill='#c8b89a'/><g transform='rotate(24 130 70)'><path d='M104 78 L112 50 L124 66 L136 44 L148 66 L160 50 L168 78 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='104' y='78' width='64' height='10' fill='#c98a1f'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Cacisa ukudideka kwekhalenda ekuqaleni: iRussia yayisebenzisa ikhalenda le-Julian, ngakho iNguquko 'kaFebruwari' yenzeka ngoMashi ngekhalenda yethu, kanti iNguquko 'ka-Oktoba' yenzeka ngoNovemba. Gcizelela ukuthi uFebruwari kwakuwukuvukelwa okuzenzakalelayo kwabantu, hhayi itulo lamaBolshevik. Ethula Amandla Amabili (Dual Power) ngokucophelela - kuchaza ukuthi kungani uHulumeni Wesikhashana wawubuthaka futhi uphila isikhathi esifushane.

slides.title: ULenin namaBolshevik
slides.lead: ULenin wabuya ekudingisweni enohlelo olubukhali, olulula olwakhuluma nabantu abakhathele impi futhi belambile.

blocks.text: Ebuya ngo-Ephreli 1917, **uVladimir Lenin** wenqaba noma yikuphi ukubambisana noHulumeni Wesikhashana. Ku-**April Theses** yakhe wafuna ukuphela kwempi masinyane, umhlaba wabalimi, kanye 'nokuthi Wonke amandla awele kuma-Soviet'. Njengoba uHulumeni Wesikhashana waqhubeka nempi, ukusekelwa kwamaBolshevik kwakhula.

items: Isinqumo sikaHulumeni Wesikhashana sokuqhubeka neMpi Yezwe Yokuqala sasingathandwa nhlobo.
ULenin wethembisa lokho abantu ababekufuna kakhulu: ukuthula, umhlaba nokudla.
AmaBolshevik anqoba amavoti amaningi kuma-soviet asePetrograd naseMoscow ngasekwindla ka-1917.

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi kungani amaBolshevik aphumelela lapho uHulumeni Wesikhashana wehluleka khona: anikeza izixazululo ezicacile, ezithandwayo empini, endlaleni yomhlaba nasekushodeni kokudla, ngenkathi uHulumeni Wesikhashana eqhubeka nempi engenakunqotshwa. Isiqubulo esithi 'Peace, Land, Bread' siyisibonelo esihle sokuxhumana kwezombusazwe - buza abafundi ukuthi kungani igama ngalinye lalibalulekile eqenjini elithize.

slides.title: AmaBolshevik athatha amandla
slides.lead: NgoNovemba 1917 (u-Oktoba ngekhalenda endala) amaBolshevik aketula uHulumeni Wesikhashana.

blocks.text: Kuhlelwe ikakhulukazi **uLeon Trotsky** ngeMilitary Revolutionary Committee yeSoviet yasePetrograd, abasebenzi abahlomile, amasosha namatilosi (ama-Red Guards) bathatha izindawo ezibalulekile ePetrograd bahlasela **iWinter Palace** **ngoNovemba 7, 1917 (25 Oktoba, ikhalenda endala)**. UHulumeni Wesikhashana wawa kancane kuphela ukumelana.

items: AmaBolshevik akhipha imithetho yokuthula neyomhlaba cishe ngokushesha.
Lokhu kwakuwukuthathwa kwamandla okuhleleke kahle, hhayi ukuvukela kwabantu abaningi njengokukaFebruwari.
IRussia yaba umbuso wokuqala emhlabeni obuswa egameni lobukhomanisi.

media.alt: Ifulege elibomvu eliphakanyiswe phezu kwesakhiwo esikhulu sesigodlo ebusuku.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#2c2c3a'/><circle cx='198' cy='34' r='14' fill='#e8e2d0'/><rect x='30' y='72' width='180' height='64' fill='#6b6b5a'/><g fill='#2c2c3a'><rect x='44' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='72' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='100' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='128' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='156' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='184' y='86' width='12' height='28'/></g><rect x='118' y='30' width='4' height='44' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='122' y='30' width='34' height='20' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dweba umehluko obalulekile: uFebruwari kwakuwukuwohloka okubanzi, okuzenzakalelayo kobukhosi; u-Oktoba kwakuwukuthathwa kwamandla okuhleliwe, okuhleleke ngokuqinile yiqembu elilodwa loqembu oluncane oluqophile. Nika uTrotsky udumo ngeqhaza lakhe lokuhlela. Qaphela ukuthi ukuthatha amandla ePetrograd kwakuyinto eyodwa - ukubamba amandla kulo lonke izwe elikhulu, elihlukene, kwakuzoletha impi yombango enonya, esithombeni esilandelayo.

slides.title: IMpi Yombango neWar Communism
slides.lead: AmaBolshevik anqoba impi yombango ecekelayo phansi kodwa ngezindleko ezinkulu zempilo yabantu.

blocks.text: Abaphikisi bamaBolshevik - **amaWhite**, umfelandawonye oxebukile wabakhosi, amaliberali kanye nezishoshovu ezincintisanayo, esekelwa amandla amazwe angaphandle - balwa namaBolshevik **amaRed**. UTrotsky wakha wahola i-**Red Army**. Ukuze ayihlomise, uhulumeni wabeka i-**War Communism**, ethatha okusanhlamvu kubalimi elawula umnotho, ngenkathi amaphoyisa ayimfihlo (i-**Cheka**) ecindezela abaphikisi ngo-'Red Terror'.

items: OwayenguMbusi nomndeni wakhe babulawa ngo-1918.
Impi, indlala nezifo kwabulala izigidi phakathi kuka-1918 no-1921.
AmaRed anqoba ngo-1921, esizwa ubunye, ukulawula indawo emaphakathi nezitimela, kanye nokungaboni ngasolinye kwamaWhite.

media.alt: Imicibisholo emibili ephikisanayo, ebomvu nempunga, ehlangana maphakathi nesithombe sebalazwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='40' width='180' height='80' rx='10' fill='#e6ddc9'/><path d='M40 80 h120 l-16 -14 v9 h-104 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M40 80 h104 v9 l16 -14 h-120 z' fill='#8a1f1f' opacity='0'/><path d='M200 80 h-70 l16 -14 v9 h54 z' fill='#6b6b6b'/><path d='M200 80 h-54 v9 l-16 -14 h70 z' fill='#6b6b6b' opacity='0'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha lesi sikhathi esinodlame ngokuzibophezela: yiba nolwazi lweqiniso ngobukhulu bokuhlupheka ngaphandle kokugxila emininingwaneni engadingekile. Chaza ukuthi kungani amaRed anqoba - indawo emaphakathi, ukulawula izitimela nezimboni, ubuholi obubodwa ngaphansi kukaTrotsky, kanye nokungaboni ngasolinye kwamaWhite. Ethula i-War Communism ne-Cheka, ngoba intukuthelo yabalimi ngokuthathwa kokusanhlamvu iholela ngqo ku-NEP esithombeni esilandelayo.

slides.title: I-NEP nokuzalwa kwe-USSR
slides.lead: ULenin wahlehlela emnothweni oxubile ukuze alulame, kanye nomfelandawonye omusha wakhiwa.

blocks.text: Ngemva kwendlala nemvukelo (kuhlanganisa imvukelo yase-**Kronstadt** ka-1921), uLenin wethula i-**New Economic Policy (NEP)** ngo-1921. Yayivumela ukuhweba okuncane okuzimele futhi yavumela abalimi ukuthi bathengise okusanhlamvu okusalayo, ngenkathi umbuso ugcina ukulawula izimboni ezinkulu. Ngo-**1922** kwasungulwa ngokusemthethweni i-**Union of Soviet Socialist Republics (USSR)**.

items: I-NEP yayiwukuvumelana okusebenzayo ukuze kwakhiwe kabusha umnotho owawuhlakazekile.
Amanye amakhomanisi ayengayithandi njengokuhlehla ebusoshiyali.
ULenin washona ngoJanuwari 1924, engashiyanga umuntu ozothatha izintambo ngokusobala.

media.alt: Uphawu lwesando nesikela oluhlangene phakathi kwendingiliza.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='80' r='52' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M64 108 q22 -50 44 -66' stroke='#e8d9a0' stroke-width='9' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M108 42 q18 12 8 34' stroke='#e8d9a0' stroke-width='9' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='60' y='96' width='52' height='9' rx='3' fill='#e8d9a0' transform='rotate(-38 86 100)'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='28' height='12' rx='2' fill='#e8d9a0' transform='rotate(-38 110 64)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza i-NEP njengokuhlehla okuyisu: uLenin wamukela ubongxiwankulu obulinganiselwe ukuze asindise inguquko ngemva kwezinhlekelele ze-War Communism. Qaphela impikiswano lokhu okwakuvula phakathi eqenjini mayelana nokuthi kuvunyelwane kangakanani - impikiswano uStalin noTrotsky ababezolwa ngayo kamuva. Ukushona kukaLenin ngaphandle komuntu oshiwo ozothatha izintambo kumisela ukulwela amandla esithombeni esilandelayo.

slides.title: Ukukhula kukaStalin emandleni
slides.lead: Umphathi weqembu othule wadlula ngobuqili abancintisana naye waba umholi oyedwa.

blocks.text: **UJoseph Stalin**, njengoNobhala Jikelele weqembu, wayelawula ukuqokwa kwabantu wakha inethiwekhi yezikhulu ezethembekile. Edlalisa abancintisani ngomunye nomunye, wanqoba **uLeon Trotsky** owaziwa kakhulu, owaxoshwa eqenjini kwathi kamuva wadingiswa wabulawa. Cishe ngo-1928 uStalin wayesengumholi ongenakuphikwa we-USSR.

items: UStalin wagcizelela 'iSoshiyali Ezweni Elilodwa (Socialism in One Country)'; uTrotsky wayefuna inguquko yomhlaba wonke.
Ukulawula kukaStalin umshini weqembu kwakuyithuba lakhe elibalulekile.
Wabe eseqala uhlelo olunzima lokuguqula umnotho weSoviet.

media.alt: Izicucu ezimbili ze-chess, esisodwa simile esinye siwile, ebhodini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='118' width='160' height='16' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#4a4a4a'><rect x='70' y='60' width='16' height='58'/><circle cx='78' cy='56' r='12'/></g><g fill='#8a1f1f'><rect x='120' y='110' width='48' height='14' rx='6'/><circle cx='166' cy='116' r='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lungisa umbono ovamile ongalungile: uStalin wanqoba hhayi ngoba ayengumcabangi omuhle kakhulu - uTrotsky wayehlonishwa kakhulu - kodwa ngoba wayelawula umshini wokuphatha weqembu nokuqokwa kwabantu. Chaza 'iSocialism in One Country' iqhathaniswe 'nenguquko engapheli (permanent revolution)' ngokulula. Misela ukushintsha kusuka kwezombusazwe kuya kwezomnotho: uStalin manje uguqula umphakathi weSoviet ngenkani.

slides.title: I-Collectivisation nokwakhiwa kwezimboni
slides.lead: UStalin waqhuba ukusebenzisa izinto zesimanje ngokushesha ngamaFive-Year Plans nokulima ngokuhlangana ngenkani.

columns.text: Abalimi baphoqwa ukuthi bayeke umhlaba ozimele bajoyine amapulazi amakhulu ahlanganyelwe (**kolkhozy**). Abalimi abacebile, ababizwa ngama-**kulak**, baphucwa impahla, badingiswa noma babulawa.

items: Okusanhlamvu kwathathwa ukondla amadolobha nokuthumela ngaphandle.
Ukumelana nokuphazamisa kwaba negalelo endlaleni eyinhlekelele ngo-1932-1933.

columns.text: AmaFive-Year Plans (kusukela ngo-1928) abeka izinhloso ezinkulu zamalahle, insimbi, uwoyela nemishini, akha amadolobha ezimboni amasha cishe kusukela ekuqaleni.

items: Umkhiqizo wezimboni ezinzima wakhuphuka kakhulu.
Abasebenzi babhekana nokuqondiswa okunzima, izimo ezimbi nokusebenza ngenkani.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa isakhiwo somugqa omabili ukuvumela abafundi baqhathanise izingalo ezimbili zenguquko yomnotho kaStalin. Yiba neqiniso ngokuncintisana okuyisisekelo sokuhlaziya kwe-CAPS: i-USSR yakha izimboni ngesivinini esimangalisayo, okwathi kamuva kwasiza ukusinda kweMpi Yezwe Yesibili, kodwa lokhu kwafezwa ngenkani, ukuhlupheka okukhulu nendlala. Indlala e-Ukraine nakwezinye izifunda ngo-1932-1933 (i-Holodomor) izokwenziwa ngokulandelayo; iphathe ngokucophelela.

slides.title: Indlala, uvalo nokuhlanzwa (purges)
slides.lead: Ukubusa kukaStalin kwahlanganisa ukusetshenziswa kwesimanje ngokushesha kanye nokucindezelwa kwabantu abaningi nokufa.

blocks.text: Indlala ka-**1932-1933**, eyayimbi kakhulu e-Ukraine (evame ukubizwa ngokuthi i-**Holodomor**), yabulala izigidi. Ngesikhathi se-**Great Purge** (1936-1938), uStalin waphendukela iqembu lakhe, ibutho nomphakathi: 'ukuqulwa kwamacala okubukisa (show trials)' kwalahla amaBolshevik amadala, kwathi inqwaba yabantu yabulawa noma yathunyelwa emakamu okusebenza ngenkani, i-**Gulag**.

items: Uvalo nokuceba kwasetshenziswa ukulawula abantu.
Inkolo yobuntu (cult of personality) yabeka uStalin njengomholi ohlakaniphe konke.
Ngo-1940 i-USSR yayisithuthuke kakhulu ezimbonini kodwa iwumbuso ozibusayo ocindezela kakhulu.

media.alt: Insimu yezikhwebu ezingenalutho ngaphansi kwesibhakabhaka esimpunga, okusikisela indlala nokulahlekelwa.

slides.notes: Lesi yisithombe esibucayi kunazo zonke - siphathe ngeqiniso elizothile nangenhlonipho kwabahluphekayo, ugweme imininingwane ebonakalayo. Yethula indlala nokuhlanzwa ngeqiniso njengezindleko zempilo yabantu zezindlela zikaStalin. Khuthaza abafundi be-FET ukubamba amaqiniso amabili ndawonye ekuhlaziyeni: inzuzo yangempela yezimboni neyemfundo, kanye nokucindezelwa kwabantu abaningi nokufa. Qaphela ukuthi izazi-mlando ziyaphikisana ngezinombolo nangezinga lenhloso ngemuva kwendlala.

slides.title: IRussia ne-USSR, 1900-1940

blocks.alt: Uhla lwezikhathi lwezehlakalo ezibalulekile eRussia kusukela ngo-1905 kuya ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yama-1930.

events.label: INguquko ka-1905: iSonto Legazi ne-October Manifesto
INguquko kaFebruwari: uMbusi Nicholas II uyesula
UStalin uyabusa; iFive-Year Plan yokuqala iyaqala

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lesi sithombe ukuhlanganisa uhlelo lwezikhathi lwayo yonke iyunithi ngaphambi kwemibuzo yokubuyekeza. Cela abafundi bakhombe amaphuzu okuphenduka futhi bahlele izehlakalo zibe izigaba ezintathu: ukuwa kombuso wamaTsar, ukuthathwa kwamandla ngamaBolshevik nokuwaqinisa, kanye noguquko lukaStalin. Qinisa iphuzu lekhalenda ye-Julian kuya ku-Gregorian kaFebruwari no-Oktoba.

slides.title: Esikufundile
slides.lead: Eminyakeni engamashumi amane iRussia yasuka embusweni ozibusayo wamaTsar yaba isikhulu sobukhomanisi - iguqulwa ngezindleko ezinkulu zempilo yabantu.

blocks.text: Uhlelo lwamaTsar lwawohloka ngenxa yomthwalo wokungalingani, ukuzibusa nengcindezi yeMpi Yezwe Yokuqala. AmaBolshevik athatha abamba amandla, kwathi ngaphansi kukaStalin i-USSR yakhiwa izimboni ngokushesha nge-collectivisation namaFive-Year Plans - impumelelo enesithunzi esimnyama sendlala, uvalo nombuso ozibusayo.

blocks.question: Chaza ukuthi kungani umbuso wamaTsar wawohloka ngo-1917. Bhekisela ezimbangeleni zesikhathi eside kanye nomthelela weMpi Yezwe Yokuqala.
AmaBolshevik akwazi kanjani ukuthatha nokugcina amandla phakathi kuka-1917 no-1921?
'UStalin waguqula i-USSR, kodwa ngezindleko eziphakeme kakhulu zempilo yabantu.' Uyavuma? Sekela impendulo yakho ngobufakazi.

slides.notes: Vala ngokubuyela embuzweni omkhulu weyunithi nasendikimbeni yoguquko ngezindleko. Imibuzo emithathu ikhuphuka ngezidingo zengqondo ukuze ihambisane nezindinganiso ze-CAPS FET: incazelo yembangela, ukuhlaziywa kokuqiniswa kwamandla, kanye nokwahlulela okunjenge-esseyi okudinga umgudu wempikiswano osekelwe. Khuthaza abafundi ukusebenzisa ubufakazi obuqondile nokukala kokubili impumelelo nezindleko.
